title: Google sheets import/export
excerpt: Is it free to import and export data from Google Sheet to ?

posts.author: shaikh (Sheikh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it free to import and export data from Google Sheet to ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Yes, we have a native integration that allows you to import from Google sheets. That said, at this time, you’d need to export your data to Excel and then import to Google sheets, as we don’t have a native function for exporting to Google sheets.
